refs.description: CPython's collections.deque implemented as a doubly linked list of fixed-size blocks for O(1) appends and pops at both ends.
libstdc++ std::deque implemented as a map of fixed-size node arrays providing O(1) random access and amortized O(1) end operations.
asyncio's Queue uses collections.deque as the default backing buffer, calling append and popleft for FIFO ordering.
multiprocessing.Queue holds pending items in a collections.deque buffer, appending new items and using popleft when feeding the underlying pipe.
